name: VTU Habba 2026
problem: Fest operations scattered across spreadsheets and manual workflows.
solution: Unified platform for registrations, schedules, and real-time event management.

name: Bliss & Bites
problem: Restaurant needed seamless ordering and admin operations in one system.
solution: Customer storefront, in-app admin, and production-ready API deployed via Gopafy.

name: RAG AI Assistant (ECHO)
problem: Multimodal knowledge retrieval across text, image, audio, and video.
solution: LangChain + FAISS pipeline with voice capabilities and FastAPI orchestration.

name: Text to Floor Plan
problem: Architectural layout ideation is slow and manual.
solution: NLP-to-layout system generating structured 2D floor plans from natural language prompts.

name: Image Restoration
problem: Low-quality images limit downstream AI pipeline performance.
solution: Deep learning super-resolution and restoration with optimized inference.

name: Portfolio Website (ROHITH.OS)
problem: Traditional portfolios fail to communicate engineering depth.
solution: Premium digital operating system experience with live GitHub data and RAG assistant.
